tasks.title: Initialize pyproject.toml with all SIM dependencies
tasks.description: Create pyproject.toml with build system, all dependencies (anthropic, crewai, upstash-redis, agentfuse-runtime, pytest, ruff, mypy), entry points for CLI, and package metadata.

tasks.title: Create src/sim_agents/ package structure
tasks.description: Create full directory structure per architecture doc: agents/, coordination/, memory/, safety/, notifications/, templates/. Add __init__.py to all packages.

tasks.title: Build coordination layer — stigmergy.py
tasks.description: Implement stigmergic coordination: environment scanning, digital pheromone reading/writing (intel/findings/, assignments/, reviews/, health/), filesystem watches for environment changes.

tasks.title: Build coordination layer — locking.py
tasks.description: Implement Redis distributed locking via Upstash: SETNX with 30-second TTL, heartbeat refresh, Lua-script-based ownership verification on release. Use upstash-redis REST client.

tasks.title: Build coordination layer — state.py
tasks.description: Implement CRDT-based shared state: G-Counter for AgentTaskTracker, OR-Set for ActiveTaskSet, LWW-Register for FileHealthScore. All backed by Upstash Redis.

tasks.title: Build Task Creator Agent
tasks.description: Agent that scans project environment (research artifacts, code health, roadmap), maintains backlog.json with priority scores (urgency gradient, dependency depth, complexity). Uses CrewAI Agent definition.

tasks.title: Build Task Assigner Agent
tasks.description: Agent that reads backlog.json, performs Vickrey auction-style allocation, writes assignments to assignments/{agent-id}.json. Implements Redis distributed locking for task claiming.

tasks.title: Build Worker/Builder Agent
tasks.description: Agent that executes assigned tasks on dedicated git branch (agent/{agent-id}/{task-id}) with git worktree isolation. Creates PRs for completed work. Uses agentfuse-runtime for LLM calls.

tasks.title: Build Checker/QA Agent
tasks.description: Immune system danger theory agent: responds to danger signals (new code, failing tests, coverage drops). Three passes: static analysis, behavioral verification, semantic review. Writes to reviews/{pr-id}.json.

tasks.title: Build Research Agent and Research Verification Agent
tasks.description: Research Agent: investigates techniques/libraries, writes to intel/findings/{date}-{topic}.json. Verification Agent: cross-references findings against actual project code, sets verified flag.

tasks.title: Build Notes/Documentation Agent
tasks.description: Living stenographer: monitors git commits, assignment changes, completion events. Maintains PROGRESS.md, DECISIONS.md, FAILURES.md. Uses observation masking for 50%+ token reduction.

tasks.title: Build Project Agent
tasks.description: Runs project in sandboxed environment, monitors startup logs, verifies packages, checks runtime errors. Writes health reports to health/runtime-report.json. Creates high-priority tickets for failures.

tasks.title: Wire all agents with orchestrator
tasks.description: Connect all 10 agents through the SIM orchestrator loop. Implement the full stigmergic coordination flow: Task Creator → Assigner → Workers → QA → Project Agent → Homeostatic check → loop.

tasks.title: Create CLI entry point
tasks.description: Build CLI with commands: sim-agents init (scaffold project), sim-agents run --cycles N --budget X (run agent loop), sim-agents status (show health), sim-agents logs (view agent logs).
